nameMeanings.name: Grizzell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Grizzle   2, 3. Compare   Grizzel  .
Variant of   Grizzle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Grizzle
meanings: Americanized form of French or Swiss French Grisel ‘gray’ or of its rare variant Grizel.
English (Hertfordshire): nickname from Middle English (Old French) grisel ‘gray(-haired)’, also used as a term for an old man.

English: occasionally perhaps from the Middle English female personal name Grisil(d) (perhaps of ancient Germanic origin), but it is attested very rarely in medieval England and probably too late to be the source of a surname in the English Midlands. It was made familiar through the heroine of Chaucer's Clerk's Tale, a re-writing of an Italian folk tale in versions by Boccaccio and Petrarch, but the personal name is earlier than the publication of Chaucer's work.

nameMeanings.name: Drake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: transferred use of the surname, which is derived in part from the Old English byname Draca ‘snake, dragon’ (which survived into the Middle Ages as a given name), and in part from Middle English drake ‘male duck’ (imported from Middle Low German) used as a nickname. Use as a given name is likely to have originated in honour of the English explorer Sir Francis Drake ( ?1540–96 ).

en.lifeSummary: Drake Grizzell was born in 1525, in England, United Kingdom. He married Esther Drake in 1549, in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1600, in Poundisford Park, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Drake Grizzellは1525年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。1549年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトピトミンスターでEsther Drakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1600年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトポウンディスフォード パークで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトピトミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Drake Grizzell(은)는 1525년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 1549년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 피트민스터에서 Esther Drake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1600년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 파우디스퍼드 박에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 피트민스터에 묻혔다.
